response.original_title: Can I Withdraw Money from Uphold? [US User Withdrawal Guide]
response.overview: Yes, U.S. users can withdraw money from  ✆ 1•833•644•5290 ✆  Uphold as long as the account is fully verified and not restricted. You can transfer funds to a linked bank account, external crypto wallet  ✆ 1•833•644•5290 ✆ , or supported payment method. Most withdrawals process within 1–3 business days, though blockchain withdrawals depend on network confirmations. ✆ 1•833•644•5290 ✆  If your withdrawal is pending or failing, review your verification status and linked payment details first.  ✆ 1•833•644•5290 ✆
response.title: Can I Withdraw Money from Uphold? [US User Withdrawal Guide]
